attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.MESSAGE_ID, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.CREATION_DATE, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.CREATED_BY, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.PO_NUMBER, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.SO_NUMBER, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.PARTNER_NAME, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ORG_CODE, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.RETURN_FROM, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.B2B_MFG_STATUS, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.RETRY_COUNT, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.TRANSMISSION_DATE, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.PROCESS_STATUS, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.REQUEST_ID, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC 
WHERE
 CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
AND CG1_X_MK_3C8_HDR_OB_IFAC.PROCESS_STATUS<>'E'
